{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Fisher Goldsign
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Fisher Goldsign]] is a web of [[madra]] between the fingers that creates webbed fingers.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
